entries.title: Events Sponsorship department
entries.content: Events Sponsorship department

entries.title: I am contacting you regarding a sponsorship opport...
entries.content:
I am contacting you regarding a sponsorship opportunity at our upcoming
Bioprocessing Summit, which will take place on 21st - 22nd April, 2022 |
Berlin, Germany.

entries.title: Find attached the agenda the of the event.
entries.content: Find attached the agenda the of the event.

entries.title: Our exhibition/sponsorship packages offer a wide r...
entries.content:
Our exhibition/sponsorship packages offer a wide range of opportunities
like:

entries.title: . Speaking slots to share your experience with a s...
entries.content: . Speaking slots to share your experience with a senior audience

entries.title: . Exhibition locations to develop relationships wi...
entries.content: . Exhibition locations to develop relationships with your target market

entries.title: . Marketing visibility to improve your reputation ...
entries.content: . Marketing visibility to improve your reputation within the industry etc.

entries.title: . Wish list of companies you want to meet can be p...
entries.content:
. Wish list of companies you want to meet can be provided to us so we can
invite them for you

entries.title: . One-to-one meetings if you wish to meet some spe...
entries.content:
. One-to-one meetings if you wish to meet some specific people on our
participants list

entries.title: The summit will bring together C-level decision ma...
entries.content:
The summit will bring together C-level decision makers from a range of
industries such as Biotechnology, Pharmaceuticals, Machinery, Food
Production, Food & Beverages etc

entries.title: Expected companies include ThermoFisher, Takeda, S...
entries.content:
Expected companies include ThermoFisher, Takeda, Sanofi, Abbvie, Novartis,
Repligen, GSK, AstraZeneca, Merck serona etc. In terms of audience
expectation, we anticipate around 150+ attendees based on previous events.

entries.title: Please note that a limited number of sponsor slots...
entries.content:
Please note that a limited number of sponsor slots are reserved in the
agenda and will be considered on a first come first served basis. If this
opportunity is something that you would like to explore, please let me know
so I can send the sponsorship packages for your consideration. You can also
request for the packages from our website  <http://www.randomworld.com>
www.randomworld.com

entries.title: If you are not the responsible person, please shar...
entries.content:
If you are not the responsible person, please share the information with the
relevant persons. Thank you and I look forward to hearing from you.

entries.title: Someone| Project Manager
entries.content: Someone| Project Manager

entries.title: Email:  <mailto:email@domain.com> email@domain.com
entries.content: Email:  <mailto:email@domain.com> email@domain.com

entries.title:
<html xmlns:v=3D"urn:schemas-microsoft-com:vml" =
...
entries.content:
To the attention of:

Marketing department

Sales department

Events Sponsorship = department

 

I am contacting you regarding a sponsorship opportunity at = our upcoming Bioprocessing = Summit, = which will take place on 21st – 22nd April, 2022 | = Berlin, Germany.

 

Find attached the agenda the of the = event.

 

Our exhibition/sponsorship packages offer a wide range of = opportunities like:

• Speaking slots to share your experience with a = senior audience

• = Exhibition locations to develop relationships with your target = market

• Marketing = visibility to improve your reputation within the industry = etc.

• Wish list = of companies you want to meet can be provided to us so we can invite = them for you

• = One-to-one meetings if you wish to meet some specific people on our = participants list

 

The summit will bring together C-level decision makers from = a range of industries such as Biotechnology, Pharmaceuticals, Machinery, = Food Production, Food & Beverages etc

Expected companies include ThermoFisher, Takeda, Sanofi, = Abbvie, Novartis, Repligen, GSK, AstraZeneca, Merck serona etc. In terms = of audience expectation, we anticipate around 150+ attendees based on = previous events.

 

Please note that a limited number of sponsor slots are = reserved in the agenda and will be considered on a first come first = served basis. If this opportunity is something that you would like to = explore, please let me know so I can send the sponsorship packages for = your consideration. You can also request for the packages from our = website www.randomworld.com

If you are not = the responsible person, please share the information with the relevant = persons. Thank you and I look forward to hearing from = you.

 

Kind regards,

 

Someone| Project Manager

Random World= Ltd.

Email: email@domain.com
